arts.ttl: Manchester City reach verbal agreement over Omar Marmoush signing
arts.sum: The Egypt forward has scored 20 times in 26 appearances for Eintracht Frankfurt this season.

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Dortmund step up pursuit of Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund are stepping up their pursuit of Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford. Transfer Talk has the latest news, gossip and rumors.

arts.ttl: Match Preview: Dortmund Face High-Flying Frankfurt
arts.sum: Dortmund rode into the break on the back of a resounding victory against Wolfsburg, with hopes that the new year might bring some fresh form and fit players into the side. Naturally, the best remedy for a record-breaking slump is to play one of the most in-form squads in the league.

The lack of intelligence and creativity from our attackers was bad enough, but we also let the league's worst team score FOUR TIMES and walk away with a well-deserved win. The only major blot on his copybook was Kiel's second goal, where he misjudged a bouncing ball, but the entirety of our left side being asleep didn't help either.

arts.ttl: Predicted Eintracht Frankfurt v Borussia Dotmund XIs
arts.sum: Omar Marmoush looks set to play his final game for Eintracht Frankfurt on Friday night after Manchester City reached a verbal agreement with the Hessen club to sign the Egyptian…

arts.ttl: Dortmund keen to sign Chelsea defender Veiga
arts.sum: German side Borussia Dortmund open talks to sign Chelsea defender Renato Veiga on an initial loan deal.

arts.ttl: Manchester City agree fee for Omar Marmoush with Eintracht Frankfurt
arts.sum: German club have been asking for more than €60m Egypt forward has 20 goals in 26 games this season Manchester City have verbally agreed a fee with Eintracht Frankfurt to bring their forward Omar Marmoush to the Etihad Stadium this month. Agreeing a figure with Eintracht has proved a protracted process for City, with the German club demanding more than €60m (£50.5m) during negotiations, given his exit will hurt their push for Champions League qualification, with the side currently third in the Bundesliga. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt vs. Borussia Dortmund preview: Sahin under pressure
arts.sum: Nuri Sahin will be desperate to claim all three points when he takes his Borussia Dortmund side to Deutsche Bank Park for Friday’s Bundesliga clash with Eintracht Frankfurt.

arts.ttl: Roger Schmidt has no interest in coaching Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: In the event that Borussia Dortmund part ways with Nuri Şahin, then Roger Schmidt has no interest in coaching the Bundesliga side because of reservations about the club’s management, according…

arts.ttl: Source: City, Frankfurt reach deal for Marmoush
arts.sum: Manchester City have reached a verbal agreement with Eintracht Frankfurt for forward Omar Marmoush, a source told ESPN.
